title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
title_es: OpenAI presenta GPT-5.6 Sol con capacidades avanzadas en código y seguridad
bajada: OpenAI mostró GPT-5.6 Sol, su modelo de siguiente generación con mejoras significativas en programación, ciencia y ciberseguridad, acompañado de su stack de seguridad más avanzado. El lanzamiento ocurre en medio de restricciones regulatorias del gobierno estadounidense.
bajada_en: OpenAI previewed GPT-5.6 Sol, its next-generation model with significant improvements in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack. The release comes amid U.S. government regulatory restrictions.

title: OpenAI unveils GPT-5.6 amid US AI regulatory drama
summary: Less than 24 hours after news broke that OpenAI would stagger its next model release at the request of the Trump administration, that model, GPT-5.6, is here. On Friday, the company unveiled the limited preview of its new GPT 5.6 model suite: Sol, the flagship; Terra, a medium-tier model for "high-volume work"; and Luna, a […]
title_es: Gobierno de EE.UU. restringe acceso a GPT-5.6 tras negociaciones con OpenAI
bajada: OpenAI limitó el despliegue de GPT-5.6 a solicitud del gobierno estadounidense, pero expresó preocupación sobre hacer de esto una norma permanente. La medida refleja presiones regulatorias crecientes sobre modelos de IA avanzada.
bajada_en: OpenAI restricted GPT-5.6 rollout at the U.S. government's request, but expressed concern about making this a permanent norm. The measure reflects growing regulatory pressure on advanced AI models.

title: OpenAI limits GPT-5.6 rollout after government request, says restrictions shouldn’t be the norm
summary: “We don’t believe this kind of government access process should become the long-term default,” says OpenAI. “It keeps the best tools from users, developers, enterprises, cyber defenders, and global partners who need them.”
title_es: OpenAI, Google y SpaceX construyen chips propios para reducir dependencia de Nvidia
bajada: OpenAI anunció Jalapeño, su chip de inferencia personalizado desarrollado con Broadcom, uniéndose a Google, Apple y SpaceX en la construcción de hardware propio. El movimiento busca diversificar proveedores y reducir costos de dependencia única.
bajada_en: OpenAI announced Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in building proprietary hardware. The move aims to diversify suppliers and reduce single-vendor dependency costs.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 is back
summary: After a rollercoaster negotiation process with the Trump administration that dragged on for two weeks, Anthropic's Mythos 5 is finally back in action - at least, somewhat, for a select group of organizations, according to a letter from the government to Anthropic that was viewed by The Verge. Fable 5, however - the public-facing Mythos-class […]
title_es: Anthropic logra autorización para liberar Mythos 5 a más de 100 organizaciones estadounidenses
bajada: Tras negociaciones de dos semanas con la administración Trump, Anthropic consiguió autorización para distribuir Mythos 5 entre más de 100 empresas y agencias gubernamentales estadounidenses. El modelo continuará restringido para uso público general.
bajada_en: After two-week negotiations with the Trump administration, Anthropic secured authorization to distribute Mythos 5 to over 100 U.S. companies and government agencies. The model remains restricted from general public use.

title: Trump Admin releases Anthropic  Mythos to be used by more than 100 US companies, agencies
summary: Over 100 companies and government agencies are reportedly authorized to use Mythos 5, including their non-American employees.
title_es: Startups asiáticas lanzan modelos rivales ante restricciones de exportación de Anthropic
bajada: Nuevas empresas de IA en Asia están lanzando modelos con capacidades similares a Mythos para evadir las restricciones de exportación estadounidenses. Los analistas advierten que EE.UU. podría perder un mercado estratégico importante.
bajada_en: Asian AI startups are launching models with Mythos-like capabilities to bypass U.S. export restrictions. Analysts warn that the U.S. risks losing a significant strategic market.

title: Asian AI startups launch Mythos-like  models as Anthropic’s export ban drags on
summary: New models are launching in Asia that promise Mythos-like capabilities without fear of an export ban. U.S. AI labs may never recover this enormous market.
title_es: DSpark: paper sobre decodificación especulativa acelera inferencia de LLMs
bajada: DeepSeek publicó un paper describiendo técnicas de decodificación especulativa que aceleran significativamente la inferencia en modelos de lenguaje. La investigación ofrece optimizaciones prácticas para developers que buscan mejorar velocidad sin comprometer calidad.
bajada_en: DeepSeek published a paper describing speculative decoding techniques that significantly accelerate LLM inference. The research offers practical optimizations for developers looking to improve speed without sacrificing quality.

title: U.S. government will decide who gets to use GPT-5.6
title_es: Europa impulsa iniciativas para desarrollar su propia IA independiente
bajada: Europa está movilizando esfuerzos para crear modelos de IA de clase mundial propios, aprovechando incertidumbre regulatoria en EE.UU. como oportunidad. El objetivo es reducir dependencia tecnológica y fortalecer autonomía estratégica regional.
bajada_en: Europe is mobilizing efforts to create its own world-class AI models, leveraging U.S. regulatory uncertainty as an opportunity. The goal is to reduce technological dependence and strengthen regional strategic autonomy.

title: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
summary: We built a model router that plugs into coding agents (e.g. Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) and intelligently sends requests to the best model to serve them. Here's a quick demo of running it locally:https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=isKhAyivtfM.At Weave, we write most of our code with AI, and it's been getting more expensive. This came to a head when Opus 4.7 was released and, thanks to its tokenizer changes, our costs shot up. We knew we didn't need Opus foreverythingbut we didn't want to lose out on the intelligence for the cases where you really need it. So we decided to build a model router to handle this for us.The Weave Router acts as an Anthropic/OpenAI endpoint specifically for coding agents. It looks at every inference request and intelligently (more on that in a sec) decides what model to send it to, handling all the translations required along the way. So it can use faster/cheaper models (e.g. DeepSeek v4, GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.6) when possible, and frontier models (Opus 4.8 & GPT 5.5 (& Fable whenever it's back)) when necessary.How do we know what model to route to? We trained an RL model on tens of thousands (so far!) of agent traces. We reward the routing model when it selects an LLM that successfully completes the given task.Here's an example: if you ask the router to plan a complex change, it will (probably) route that request to Opus 4.8. Subagents exploring the codebase to gather context will be routed to more suitable models (e.g. DeepSeek V4 Flash). Then when you have the plan ready to implement, it will be (most likely) be handed to a quicker model (e.g. GLM 5.2) to carry it out.We've been using this internally for the last month or so. We've saved 40% on tokens vs. what we otherwise would have paid, with no noticeable differences in quality or velocity.The router is source-available under Elastic License 2.0, so you can self-host it. Or if you prefer, you can also use our hosted version: weaverouter.com.I'll be here to answer any questions you may
title_es: Show HN: Smart model routing directly in Claude, Codex and Cursor
bajada: We built a model router that plugs into coding agents (e.g. Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, etc.) and intelligently sends requests to the best model to serve them. Here's a quick demo of running it locall

title: OpenAI Has New AI Models. Here’s Why You Can’t Use Them
summary: The White House asked OpenAI to delay the rollout of its GPT-5.6 AI models, two weeks after Anthropic had to take its most advanced AI models offline.
title_es: OpenAI Has New AI Models. Here’s Why You Can’t Use Them
bajada: The White House asked OpenAI to delay the rollout of its GPT-5.6 AI models, two weeks after Anthropic had to take its most advanced AI models offline.

title: Europe Is Fed Up and Wants Its Own AI
summary: It's a stretch to think that the continent can build a top-tier model, but it has an advantage: Donald Trump.

title: Why everyone from OpenAI to SpaceX is building their own chips (and turning up the heat on Nvidia)
summary: Nvidia has dominated the AI chip market for years, but the era of total dependence might be ending.   OpenAI just shared its plans to spice things up with Jalapeño, its custom inference chip built with Broadcom, joining Google, Apple, and SpaceX in a growing list of companies building their way out of single-supplier risk. The goal is less of a […]
title_es: Weave Router: herramienta inteligente de enrutamiento de modelos para agentes de código
bajada: Weave lanzó un router de modelos que dirige solicitudes inteligentemente entre diferentes LLMs (DeepSeek, Claude, GPT) para optimizar costos y rendimiento en agentes de codificación. La herramienta entrenada con RL reduce gastos mientras mantiene calidad donde es crítica.
bajada_en: Weave launched a model router that intelligently directs requests across different LLMs to optimize costs and performance in coding agents. The RL-trained tool reduces expenses while maintaining quality where it matters most.

title: DSpark: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference [pdf]
title_es: OpenAI contrata ex-director de Uber India para liderar su expansión en el mercado
bajada: OpenAI fichó al exjefe de Uber India para dirigir su operación en el país, considerado su mayor mercado fuera de EE.UU. El movimiento marca la aceleración de la expansión en oficinas, asociaciones e inversión en talento local.
bajada_en: OpenAI hired the former Uber India chief to lead its operation in the country, considered its largest market outside the U.S. The move marks acceleration in office expansion, partnerships, and local talent investment.
